summary: The diff adds a `config/writable_paths_overrides.yaml` and a 60-line loader for a single-use override that the issue never asked for. Speculative configurability; delete it and inline the one path.

concerns.description: New `writable_paths_overrides` indirection adds a config knob with no caller in this PR.
concerns.recommendation: Remove the overrides loader and inline the anchored glob directly on the RecoveryManager agent.
